hero.subtitle: Prompt Anatomy is a practical system for working with AI tools, agents and automation.
hero.bullet1: From random answers → to predictable outcomes
hero.bullet2: Save up to 50% of time on everyday tasks
hero.bullet3: 115+ vetted templates for real business processes
hero.valueLine: Master AI prompting for real work
hero.subtext: Learn to run AI like an operating system. Prompt engineering, automation and AI agents for real business results.
hero.codeContextValue: Create a marketing strategy and plan

whatIs.title: What is Prompt Anatomy
whatIs.valueLine1: Prompt Anatomy is an operating system for working with AI.
whatIs.valueLine2: Instead of random prompts, you get structure: a 6-block methodology, a template library and a practical guide to building GPTs, agents and automation.

methodology.paragraph: Enough of random results. We deploy engineering thinking – in every module: learning → check → practice.

items.title: Breakdown
items.desc: Deconstruct problems into atomic elements that AI interprets without errors.

items.title: Engineering
items.desc: Layered construction using CoT (Chain of Thought) and Few-shot engineering.

items.title: Scale
items.desc: The system integrates into business processes, saving 10–20 hours per week.

ecosystem.title: Adapt the system to real work
ecosystem.paragraph: For automation, content, hiring and leadership decisions.

items.title: PromptAnatomy Cloud
items.outcome: Educational and practical content that routes users to the main system.

items.title: PromptAnatomy Pro
items.outcome: Professional and B2B offers for teams and leaders.

ecosystemRouter.title: One brand, three clear roles
ecosystemRouter.description: Choose by intent: the main conversion hub, Cloud for education, and Pro for B2B solutions.

app.title: promptanatomy.app
app.body: Main conversion center: plans, checkout, and training access.

cloud.title: promptanatomy.cloud
cloud.body: Practical learning content and entry points that feed the main system.

pro.title: promptanatomy.pro

pricing.title: Choose a plan
pricing.subtext: Get access to the training, prompt library and 6-block methodology.
pricing.cumulativeNote: You can upgrade to a higher plan later.
pricing.coreIncludesStarter: Everything in Starter plus Context engineering.
pricing.returningBody: Enter the email you used at checkout and continue your training without a password.
pricing.accessHow: Email → Check → Go to training. No password.
pricing.noAccessBody: No access found for this email. Choose a plan below to get started.
pricing.modulesLocked: Modules 7–15 coming in a later phase.
pricing.accessStepsHint: 1. Enter your email · 2. Tap Check · 3. Go to training
pricing.accessStoragePrivacy: Your email may be saved in this browser only so you don’t have to re-enter it each time (not a login account).
pricing.clearStoredEmail: Forget saved email on this device

items.q: What do I get when I pay?
items.a: Access to the modules in your selected plan, the training content, hands-on exercises and the prompt library. Starter includes modules 1–3, Core includes 1–6. Complete and pass (from 70%) to receive the certificate. Support is provided in our public Telegram group. Lifetime access.

items.q: How do I access the training?
items.a: No password. Enter your payment email → Check → Go to training. Same steps anytime from this site, Pricing section.

Modules by plan (Starter: 1–3, Core: 1–6), the prompt library, the 6-block methodology, hands-on exercises, a certificate from 70% and the public Telegram group. Core additionally includes context engineering.
Yes. We store only the purchase ID; payments via Stripe. Data handled per EU and US security practices.
Support in the public Telegram group (link in the footer and after payment).

items.q: What's the difference between Starter and Core?
items.a: Starter: modules 1–3. Core: modules 1–6 (full course). If you start with Starter, you can upgrade to Core later.

items.q: What languages are the trainings in?
items.a: Trainings are available in Lithuanian and English.

footer.tagline: We deploy an engineering AI work culture. It's not a course – it's an operating system for your business future.
footer.creator: creator: tomas staniulis

legal.privacyDescription: Privacy policy. Data handled per EU and US best practices; only purchase ID stored.
legal.privacyIntro: Short guidelines. For questions, contact us.
legal.privacyPrinciples: We collect data in line with EU and US data security best practices. We collect only what is necessary for the service.
legal.privacyData: We store only the user's purchase (transaction) ID. Access to the operating system is granted based on it. No additional personal data is collected.
legal.privacyRights: You can request access to your data or its deletion. Contact us.
legal.termsDescription: Terms of service for Prompt Anatomy. Services provided in the EU under sole proprietor registration.
legal.termsIntro: Short terms. For questions, contact us.
legal.termsScope: Services are provided in the European Union. The provider operates under sole proprietor (individual activity) registration.
legal.termsInvoice: An invoice can be issued on request. Contact us.
legal.termsVat: VAT is included in the price.
legal.termsSupport: In case of payment issues we provide full support: access to content via GitHub, help via our public Telegram group.

success.heading: Payment complete
success.body: Payment received. Your access is being set up. If you have any questions, please contact us.
success.emailDisclaimer: If you don't receive an email within a few minutes, check spam or contact us.
success.redirectError: Could not prepare the link. You can return home or contact us.
success.noSession: If you just paid – please wait, the system is preparing your access.
success.nextTime: Next time: promptanatomy.app → Pricing → enter email → Check → Go to training.

cancel.heading: Payment cancelled
cancel.body: Your payment was not completed. You can return anytime to purchase access to the Prompt Anatomy training.
